title: × neotinacamptis huteri
intro: × Neotinacamptis huteri is a rare and endangered species of orchid, specifically a hybrid of Neotinacamptis and another orchid species, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its unique medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of × Neotinacamptis huteri include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture or infused in water to be consumed as a medicinal tea, although its use is largely restricted due to its rarity and endangered status.
